query:
SELECT 
  rp.id,
  rp.categoryId,
  rp.feedItemId,
  rp.qtyPerHeadPerDay,
  rp.effectiveDate,
  rp.isActive,
  rp.deletedAt
FROM ration_plans rp
WHERE rp.categoryId = 7 AND rp.feedItemId = 1
ORDER BY rp.id;
